faq.question: What is Claude best for?
faq.answer: Claude is best for ad testing and fast creative production.

faq.question: How much does Claude cost?
faq.answer: Review the current Claude pricing page because plan names, limits, and promotions can change.

faq.question: Is Claude good for teams?
faq.answer: Yes, Claude can work for teams when its collaboration, governance, and pricing fit the workflow.

faq.question: What are the main Claude limitations?
faq.answer: The main limitations are reflected in the cons section and should be weighed against your use case.

faq.question: How does Claude compare with alternatives?
faq.answer: Claude should be compared on pricing, core features, ease of use, integrations, and support.

faq.question: Does Claude have a free plan?
faq.answer: Check the official Claude site for current free-plan availability and usage limits.

faq.question: Who should avoid Claude?
faq.answer: Skip Claude if the not-for section describes your needs better than the best-for section.

faq.question: How long does Claude take to set up?
faq.answer: Most readers can evaluate Claude quickly, but full rollout depends on team size and integrations.

faq.question: Can beginners use Claude?
faq.answer: Yes, beginners can start with the basics and expand into advanced workflows over time.

faq.question: What should I check before buying Claude?
faq.answer: Confirm pricing, required features, integrations, data policies, and support expectations before buying.

faq.question: Is Claude worth it in 2026?
faq.answer: For the right audience, Claude is worth shortlisting in 2026.

faq.question: Where can I try Claude?
faq.answer: Use the review button or official website to try Claude directly.

whyTrust.title: Affiliate disclosure first
whyTrust.description: Buttons may earn a commission, but the review includes both benefits and limitations so readers can decide confidently.

whyTrust.title: Conversion-focused criteria
whyTrust.description: The page evaluates speed, ease of use, pricing clarity, output quality, and practical fit for common marketing workflows.

whyTrust.title: Easy to update
whyTrust.description: All claims live in JSON so you can refresh pricing, screenshots, FAQs, and affiliate links without rewriting code.

notFor.title: Pixel-perfect designers
notFor.description: If you need complete manual control over every layer, a traditional design suite may be a better fit.

notFor.title: No ad testing budget
notFor.description: The biggest value appears when you can test multiple creatives across paid or organic channels.

notFor.title: Set-and-forget users
notFor.description: AI drafts still benefit from human review, brand checks, and performance-based iteration.
